summary: Verified and tightened US-842 accessibility for legal action controls. Legal actions and playable/discard cards are native buttons, human controls are suppressed for AI actors and finished states, card controls have descriptive aria-labels, discard selection exposes aria-pressed plus changing action labels/count text, and in-game action/card buttons now have focus-visible styles. Focused UI/regression tests and the full project verify gate passed.

tests_run.command: npm run test -- src/ui/render.test.ts src/ui/controller.test.ts src/test/ruleFlow.integration.test.ts
tests_run.result: failed during verifier test-authoring, then passed
tests_run.evidence: Initial verifier-authored assertions had unstable fixture/source-import assumptions. After correcting the tests, the focused run passed 3 files / 28 tests, covering render accessibility, start/resume controller behavior, and US-842 rule-flow integration.

tests_run.result: failed during verifier test-authoring, then passed
tests_run.evidence: An intermediate run passed all tests but failed tsc because a verifier-only test imported node:fs without Node type declarations. After removing the brittle source-import assertion, final npm run verify passed 11 files / 101 tests and completed tsc plus vite build.

node_package_scripts.verify: npm run test && npm run build

verification_environment.notes: No backend, live API, or browser-server evidence applies to this accessibility verification. Evidence is from source accessibility review plus jsdom UI/regression tests.

quality_gate_matrix.expected: Legal action controls and playable/discard cards are native buttons or otherwise tabbable and keyboard-clickable; disabled controls do not become the only cue for state.
quality_gate_matrix.evidence: src/ui/render.ts renders legal action controls and cards as button elements; renderGame binds click handlers only to legal human actions, disables non-legal play cards, and uses visible action-note/discard-count text for state.

quality_gate_matrix.expected: Legal action controls and card controls have understandable text or accessible names. Cards need aria-labels. Discard controls need aria-pressed and an understandable confirmation label.
quality_gate_matrix.evidence: src/ui/render.ts adds Russian accessible names for bid/order controls, card labels such as '7 трефы', discard toggle labels that switch between select/remove wording, aria-pressed on discard cards, and 'Подтвердить снос 2 выбранных карт' on the confirmation button. src/ui/render.test.ts asserts these names and states.

quality_gate_matrix.expected: Buttons and card controls have focus-visible styles, not just hover styles, and CSS covers generic action buttons and card buttons beyond the start screen.
quality_gate_matrix.evidence: src/styles.css includes .actions button:focus-visible/.secondary:focus-visible and button.card:focus-visible rules with visible outlines and offset box-shadow rings. Existing start-screen focus-visible rules remain in place.

quality_gate_matrix.expected: Legal, disabled, and selected states do not rely only on color; text, disabled attribute, aria-pressed, and visible text/state provide meaning.
quality_gate_matrix.evidence: Discard selection uses aria-pressed, visible count text ('Снос: выберите...' / 'Снос выбран...'), selected card lift/outline, and a disabled/enabled confirmation button. Legal actions are rendered as explicit text buttons; disabled non-legal card controls use the native disabled attribute.

quality_gate_matrix.expected: AI actor and finished states must not expose clickable human controls.
quality_gate_matrix.evidence: src/ui/render.test.ts verifies no action keys and no enabled playable cards for AI actor and finished states; src/ui/render.ts returns early from renderActions for non-human actors.

quality_gate_matrix.expected: Focused UI tests and full project verification pass after any verifier fixes.
quality_gate_matrix.evidence: Final focused command passed 3 files / 28 tests. Final npm run verify passed 11 files / 101 tests and completed production build.
